taskName.description: The name of the task to create

sourceConnectionId.description: The connection id of the source database where the source tables reside

sourceDatabaseType.description: The database type of the source connection, e.g. Mysql, PostgreSQL, Oracle, etc.

targetConnectionId.description: The connection id of the target database where the merged result will be written to

targetDatabaseType.description: The database type of the target connection, e.g. MongoDB, Mysql, etc.

targetTableName.description: The name of the target table/collection to write the merged data into

tableName.description: The name of the main source table

arrayKeys.description: The primary key or unique key fields of the main table, used for merge identification

childTables.description: The child/sub tables to merge into the main table

tableName.description: The name of the child source table

joinKeys.description: The join key mappings between child and main table

source.description: The field name in the child table

target.description: The field name in the main table to join on

targetPath.description: The embedded path in the target document for this child table's data

mergeType.description: The merge type: updateWrite (embed as sub-document) or updateIntoArray (embed into array). Default: updateWrite

arrayKeys.description: The key fields used for array element identification (required when mergeType is updateIntoArray)

syncType.description: The sync type: initial_sync (full sync only), initial_sync+cdc (full + incremental), cdc (incremental only). Default: initial_sync+cdc
